meaning: n.鍏叡鏈烘瀯,鍗忎細,鍒跺害
examples: I believe in the institution of marriage.
Bernard works at the same institution as Arlette.
The European Parliament is not an institution which excites interest in voters.
But the institution would only consider selling works by living artists and with their permission.
Their buyers now need to show licenses indicating that they are a shop or other institution.
